summary: All LiveKit code_refs and source figures verified accurate except one miscitation: the RecognitionHooks 5-hook list is attributed to agent_activity.py:74-82 (which are perform_* imports), but the actual RecognitionHooks Protocol with those exact 5 hooks is at audio_recognition.py:74-82. Same line range, wrong file. Everything else SUPPORTED.

claims.claim: stt/vad/llm/tts stored as self._* plus _turn_detection in __init__ (222-406)
claims.found: def __init__ at 222; self._stt/_vad/_llm/_tts at 401-404; self._turn_detection = raw_turn_detection at 406
llm: NotGivenOr[llm.LLM | llm.RealtimeModel | LLMModels | str] = NOT_GIVEN

claims.claim: creates AgentActivity(agent, self) and swaps on handoff via _update_activity (1325-1346)
claims.found: async def _update_activity at 1325; self._next_activity = AgentActivity(agent, self) at 1346

claims.claim: stt_node auto-wraps non-streaming STT with StreamAdapter(stt, vad)
claims.found: if not activity.stt.capabilities.streaming: ... wrapped_stt = stt.StreamAdapter(stt=wrapped_stt, vad=activity.vad) at 430

claims.claim: llm_node opens llm.chat and asserts non-realtime
claims.found: assert isinstance(activity.llm, llm.LLM)... at 471; async with activity_llm.chat(chat_ctx=..., tools=..., tool_choice=...) at 479

claims.claim: tts_node auto-wraps non-streaming TTS with StreamAdapter + SentenceTokenizer
claims.found: if not activity.tts.capabilities.streaming: wrapped_tts = tts.StreamAdapter(tts=wrapped_tts, sentence_tokenizer=tokenize.blingfire.SentenceTokenizer(retain_format=True)) at 499-503

claims.claim: transcription_node forwards text for client display
claims.found: async def transcription_node at 522; async for delta in text: yield delta

claims.claim: RecognitionHooks list: on_start_of_speech, on_interim_transcript, on_final_transcript, on_end_of_turn, on_preemptive_generation
claims.found: agent_activity.py:74-82 are imports of perform_text_forwarding, perform_tool_executions, perform_tts_inference etc. The RecognitionHooks Protocol declaring exactly those 5 hooks is in a DIFFERENT FILE.
claims.correction: audio_recognition.py:74-82 (class RecognitionHooks(Protocol) with on_start_of_speech:76, on_interim_transcript:79, on_final_transcript:80, on_end_of_turn:81, on_preemptive_generation:82)

claims.claim: on_end_of_turn deliberately synchronous 'to avoid it being cancelled by the AudioRecognition' and spawns reply task itself
claims.found: def on_end_of_turn at 1921; comment line 1922 'IMPORTANT: This method is sync to avoid it being cancelled by the AudioRecognition'; line 1923 'We explicitly create a new task here'

claims.claim: Deepgram catalogs as 'LiveKit Audio Room Agent (Transport Topology)' - LiveKit owns room/SFU, agent is peer, STT/TTS plug in
claims.found: label 'LiveKit Audio Room Agent (Transport Topology)' at line 1649; description at 1659-1669: 'AI agent participating as a peer. Deepgram processes incoming audio for transcription and generates synthesized speech that is published back into the room. LiveKit handles participant management, routing, and scalability.' ('nodes' is note's own gloss, not a Deepgram quote)

claims.claim: JS SDK mirrors Python 1:1 - same AgentSession/AgentActivity/AudioRecognition split
claims.found: agent_session.ts:262 export class AgentSession; agent_activity.ts:184 export class AgentActivity implements RecognitionHooks; audio_recognition.ts:204 export class AudioRecognition
